verses.2: Surely there are mockers with me.
verses.3: “Now give a pledge. Be collateral for me with yourself.
verses.4: For you have hidden their heart from understanding,
verses.5: He who denounces his friends for plunder,
verses.6: “But he has made me a byword of the people.
verses.7: My eye also is dim by reason of sorrow.
verses.8: Upright men will be astonished at this.
verses.9: Yet the righteous will hold to his way.
verses.10: But as for you all, come back.
verses.12: They change the night into day,
verses.13: If I look for Sheol as my house,
verses.14: if I have said to corruption, ‘You are my father,’
verses.16: Shall it go down with me to the gates of Sheol,
